# Olova UI - Modern React Component Library

> 500+ Animated React Components | Built with Tailwind CSS & Framer Motion

Olova UI is a comprehensive, production-ready React component library designed for modern web applications. First UI library from Bangladesh.

## 🌐 Official Links

- Website: https://olovaui.olova.net
- Documentation: https://olovaui.olova.net/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/olova.net/olovaui
- NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/olovaui
- Twitter: @olovaui

## ✨ Key Features

- **500+ Animated Components**: Extensive collection of production-ready components
- **Tailwind CSS 4**: Modern utility-first CSS framework
- **Framer Motion 12**: Smooth, performant animations
- **TypeScript 5**: Full type safety and IntelliSense
- **React 19 & Next.js 16**: Latest React features and optimizations
- **Dark Mode**: Built-in theme switching with next-themes
- **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 compliant components
- **Copy-Paste Ready**: No npm install required, just copy and customize
- **Static Export**: Optimized for static site generation
- **Performance Optimized**: Bundle size optimized, lazy loading, code splitting
- **SEO Friendly**: Built-in SEO optimization and structured data
- **Free & Open Source**: MIT License

## 🚀 Quick Start

### CLI Installation (Recommended)
```bash
# Using npm
npx shadcn@latest add "https://olovaui.olova.net/registry/button.json"

# Using pnpm
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add "https://olovaui.olova.net/registry/button.json"

# Using yarn
yarn dlx shadcn@latest add "https://olovaui.olova.net/registry/button.json"

# Using bun
bunx shadcn@latest add "https://olovaui.olova.net/registry/button.json"
```

### Manual Installation
1. Browse components at https://olovaui.olova.net/docs
2. Copy component code
3. Paste into your project
4. Customize as needed

## 📦 Prerequisites

```bash
npm install tailwindcss framer-motion class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react next-themes
```

## 🧩 Component Categories

### UI Components (Essential)
- Button - Interactive buttons with ripple effects, loading states, variants
- Card - Flexible content containers with hover effects
- Badge - Status indicators and labels
- Tabs - Tabbed navigation with multiple styles
- Accordion - Collapsible content sections
- Dropdown - Dropdown menus and select components
- Navbar - Responsive navigation bars
- Footer - Footer sections with multiple layouts
- Dock - macOS-style dock navigation
- Marquee - Infinite scrolling content

### Form Components
- Login - Complete login form with validation
- Signin - Sign-in forms with social auth
- Password - Password input with strength indicator
- Forgot Password - Password recovery forms
- Two-Step - Two-factor authentication
- Multi Selector - Advanced multi-select dropdown
- Search - Search inputs with fuzzy search

### Animation Components
- Flip Words - Animated text flipping effects
- Text Reveal - Text animation reveals
- Sparkles Text - Sparkle effect text
- Decrypting - Decryption animation effect
- Shimmer - Shimmer loading effects
- Loaders - Various loading animations
- Retro - Retro-style animations

### Layout Components
- Hero - Hero sections with multiple variants
- Pricing - Pricing tables and cards
- Testimonial - Customer testimonials
- Portfolio - Portfolio showcases
- Team Member - Team member cards
- Waitlist - Waitlist signup forms
- File Tree - File/folder tree view
- Masonry - Masonry grid layouts

### Interactive Components
- Carousel - Image and content carousels
- Network - Network graph visualizations
- Copy Button - Code copy functionality
- Color Palette - Color picker and palette
- Gradient - Gradient generators
- Fuzzy - Fuzzy search interface
- Magic - Magic cursor effects
- Spotlight Card - Spotlight hover effects

### Specialized Components
- NFT Marketplace - NFT card designs
- Amazon Gift - Gift card styled components
- Code Profile - Developer profile cards
- Pattern - Background patterns
- Aurora - Aurora background effects
- Integrations - Integration showcases
- Prompt - AI prompt inputs

## 💻 Tech Stack

### Core
- **React 19.0.0** - Latest React with Server Components
- **Next.js 16.0.0** - App Router, Static Export
- **TypeScript 5** - Strict mode enabled

### Styling
- **Tailwind CSS 4** - Utility-first CSS
- **Framer Motion 12** - Animation library
- **class-variance-authority** - Component variants
- **tailwind-merge + clsx** - ClassName utilities

### UI Primitives
- **Radix UI** - Accessible component primitives
- **Lucide React** - Icon library
- **next-themes** - Dark mode support

### Development
- **ESLint 9** - Code linting
- **Prettier 3.6.2** - Code formatting
- **Husky** - Git hooks
- **Commitizen** - Conventional commits

## 🎯 Use Cases

- **SaaS Applications**: Build modern SaaS dashboards and interfaces
- **Landing Pages**: Create stunning landing pages quickly
- **Admin Dashboards**: Comprehensive admin panel components
- **E-commerce**: Product cards, checkout flows, shopping carts
- **Documentation Sites**: Beautiful documentation layouts
- **Portfolio Sites**: Showcase your work professionally
- **Marketing Sites**: High-converting marketing pages
- **Web Apps**: Full-featured web applications

## 🌟 Why Choose Olova UI?

1. **Developer-First**: Built by developers, for developers
2. **No Vendor Lock-in**: Copy-paste approach means full control
3. **Production Ready**: Battle-tested in real applications
4. **Actively Maintained**: Regular updates and new components
5. **Great Documentation**: Comprehensive docs with live examples
6. **Performance Focused**: Optimized bundle size and loading
7. **Accessibility**: WCAG compliant components
8. **Customizable**: Easy to theme and modify
9. **Modern Stack**: Latest React, Next.js, and Tailwind
10. **Free Forever**: MIT License, no hidden costs

## 📊 Performance

- **Lighthouse Score**: 95+ across all metrics
- **Bundle Size**: Optimized with tree-shaking
- **Load Time**: < 2s on 3G networks
- **Core Web Vitals**: Excellent ratings
- **SEO Score**: 100/100

## 🔧 Configuration

### Tailwind Config
```js
// tailwind.config.js
module.exports = {
  content: [
    './src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}',
  ],
  theme: {
    extend: {
      // Olova UI theme extensions
    },
  },
  plugins: [],
}
```

### Path Aliases
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  }
}
```
